    Felix Otieno Arogo

    Cloud Solutions Architect AWS & GCP Security-focused engineer building scalable, secure cloud solutions

    Projects

    🚀 Projects Portfolio

    A curated portfolio of hands-on work in cloud architecture and security engineering, focused on building resilient, secure, and well-architected systems.

    ☁️ Cloud Architecture

    Projects focused on AWS, Azure, and hybrid cloud design, including high availability, networking, infrastructure security, and scalable architecture.

    Includes: cloud networking, architecture labs, secure infrastructure, and platform design.

    View Projects →

    🔐 Security Engineering

    Projects covering IAM, network security, traffic analysis, threat detection, penetration testing labs, and cloud security assessments.

    Includes: IAM labs, VPNs, packet analysis, AppSec, and monitoring.

    View Projects →

    🎯 Focus Areas

    Cloud Security Architecture

    Secure design across AWS, Azure, and hybrid environments.

    Network Security

    Traffic analysis, segmentation, VPNs, and secure connectivity.

    Threat Detection

    Packet analysis, monitoring, and investigation of suspicious activity.

    Identity & Access Management

    Least privilege, policy analysis, and access control design.
